race.comment: TSZYUYA (11) brings Doomben form to peak for the top metro stable. Has more to give, and a gun hoop is reunited. Maps for the run of the race, and expect her to manage the step up to 1625m. SICILIAN WARRIOR (5) knuckled down strongly to get within a neck of the winner over 1650m at Beaudesert. Has an awkward gate but is busting to win and deserves another chance. HELL TO THE LINE (4) did a good job to place over 1350 at Warwick. Just missed there over 1500m before the spell, and fitter this journey should hold no fears. ROYSTON (13) wasn't far away against the above at Warwick 17 days ago following a switch from an elite stable. Has a low gate and Wiggins aboard. Has the ability and can fire.
